title: athlete-guardian — PHP attribute contracts
description: One attribute. `#[AsAthleteGuardianListener]` on a service class marks it as a subscriber to guardianship-lifecycle events — AttributeDiscovery picks it up and wires it to the event map declared in `events.json`.

attributes.name: AsAthleteGuardianListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to AthleteGuardian lifecycle events (GuardianAdded / GuardianRemoved / PrimaryGuardianChanged / GuardianCustodyChanged / GuardianVerified / GuardianVerificationDisputed / GuardianVerificationRevoked / GuardianCanPickupToggled / GuardianCanReceiveCommunicationsToggled / GuardianCanAuthoriseMedicalCareToggled / GuardianCommunicationsBounced).

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names. Empty = subscribe to every event in `Academorix\Sports\AthleteGuardian\Events\Guardian*`. Names resolve against events.json at boot.
